title: Liquid Transfer Protocol for Plate Filling
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol performs a basic plate filling protocol for 9 plates from one source reservoir. The same set of tips is used for the entire protocol, and tips are tracked across protocols. The protocol is adapted to Python from [this Protocol Designer protocol](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/0c3e45/pd.json).
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
